PAYWALL.TITLE: Upgrade to use Kanban
PAYWALL.DESCRIPTION: The Kanban feature requires a Pro or Enterprise plan.
PAYWALL.UPGRADE_PROMPT: Upgrade your plan to access Kanban boards, pipeline management, and workflow automation.
PAYWALL.NON_ADMIN_MESSAGE: The Kanban feature is not available on your current plan. Please reach out to your administrator to upgrade.

BOARD.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this board? This action cannot be undone.
BOARD.EMPTY_STATE: No conversations on this board yet.
BOARD.EMPTY_STATE_HINT: Conversations matching this board's filters will appear here automatically.
BOARD.NO_COLUMNS: This board has no columns yet.
BOARD.NO_BOARDS: No boards yet. Create your first board to get started.
BOARD.SELECT: Select a board to get started

COLUMN.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure? All cards in this column will be removed from the board.
COLUMN.ENTER_ACTIONS: On Enter — run when a card moves into this column
COLUMN.EXIT_ACTIONS: On Exit — run when a card leaves this column
COLUMN.TYPE_WON_DESC: Cards that enter this column are automatically archived as Won.
COLUMN.TYPE_LOST_DESC: Cards that enter this column are automatically archived as Lost.
COLUMN.ENTER_ACTIONS_LABEL: On Enter — runs when a card enters this column
COLUMN.EXIT_ACTIONS_LABEL: On Exit — runs when a card leaves this column
COLUMN.ACTION_AUTO_CREATE_TASK: Set as entry column for new conversations
COLUMN.ACTION_AUTO_CREATE_TASK_DESC: Marks this column as the entry point when the funnel is set as Default. New conversations matching the funnel's inbox filters will be placed here automatically. Has no effect if the funnel is not set as Default.
COLUMN.ACTION_AUTO_ASSIGN_AGENT_DESC: When a card enters this column without an assigned agent, automatically assign it to the available agent with the fewest tasks.
COLUMN.ACTION_AUTO_ASSIGN_CONV_DESC: When an agent is assigned to a task, automatically assign that agent to the linked unassigned conversation.
COLUMN.ACTION_AUTO_RESOLVE_DESC: When a card is moved to this column, automatically resolve the linked conversation.
COLUMN.ACTION_WEBHOOK_ENTER_DESC: Send an HTTP POST request to a URL when a card enters this column.
COLUMN.ACTION_WEBHOOK_EXIT_DESC: Send an HTTP POST request to a URL when a card leaves this column.
COLUMN.ACTION_ASSIGN_AGENT_DESC: Assign a specific agent to every card that enters this column.
COLUMN.ACTION_ASSIGN_TEAM_DESC: Assign a specific team to every card that enters this column.
COLUMN.WEBHOOK_FUTURE_NOTE: In a future version, you will be able to wait for the webhook response and use it in automations — for example, connecting to a CRM or n8n to fetch data and send messages.

CARD.REMOVE_CONFIRM: Remove this conversation from the board?
CARD.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete this card permanently? This cannot be undone.

OVERVIEW.TITLE: Funnels
OVERVIEW.EMPTY_DESCRIPTION: Create your first funnel to start organizing conversations into pipelines.
OVERVIEW.CREATE_ERROR: Failed to create funnel. Please try again.

ADD_CARD.TITLE: Add conversation to funnel
ADD_CARD.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Type contact name or conversation ID...
ADD_CARD.ERROR: Could not add conversation. It may already be on this board.

SETTINGS.AGENTS_HINT: Restrict access to specific agents. Leave empty to allow all agents.
SETTINGS.INBOXES_HINT: Only conversations from these inboxes will be auto-added to this funnel. Leave empty for all inboxes.
SETTINGS.DELETE_WARNING: Once you delete a funnel, there is no going back. All tasks and stages will be permanently deleted.
SETTINGS.DELETE_CONFIRM_PROMPT: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
SETTINGS.SAVE_ERROR: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
SETTINGS.INTAKE_COLUMN_HINT: New conversations matching this funnel will be placed in this column.
SETTINGS.TEAMS_HINT: Restrict access to specific teams. Leave empty to allow all teams.
SETTINGS.DEFAULT_HINT: The default funnel automatically receives new conversations from matching inboxes.

TEMPLATE.CHOOSE_DESCRIPTION: Start from a template or create an empty funnel.
TEMPLATE.EMPTY_DESC: Start from scratch with no columns.

CONVERSATION_ACTION.TITLE: Kanban
CONVERSATION_ACTION.ADD_ERROR: Failed to add to funnel. It may already be there.

OUTCOME_REASON_MODAL.DESCRIPTION: This card will be archived. You can optionally add a reason.

REPORTS.TITLE: Kanban Reports
REPORTS.DESCRIPTION: Track won and lost outcomes across your kanban boards.

TASK.SEARCH_CONV_PLACEHOLDER: Search by contact or conversation ID...
TASK.ERROR_CREATE: Failed to create task. Please try again.
